lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Rest in bed for a bit?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Some rest never killed anybody.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I still have stuff to do.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Nothing else to do here yet.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text:
Its late and too dark to see anything here. 
	Maybe only the scary monsters your father told you about here many years ago.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text:
You aproach the campfire. You remeber all the memories you had here with friends and family.
 	You look behind a particular looking log where you hide your cigarets.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh hey. Theyre still there. And olny a little soggy and moldy. Maybe I should take them?

choices.text: Yeah, maybe theyll come in handy.
Nah. Dont need to get caught with them on me.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text:
Its late and too dark to see anything here. 
	Maybe only the scary monsters your father told you about here many years ago.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You grab the cigarets

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You leave the cigarets there. You can return to take them later if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text:
You come back to the campfire theres nothing here but your hiding spot. 
	Do you want to put the cigarets back in the hiding spot?

choices.text: No, ill keep them on me for now.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You keep the cigarets on you. Be careful not to get caught.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You leave the cigarets there. You can return to take them later if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The flower your mom has been watering instead of you seems like its healthy and growing.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Mom always told me that in times of need i should pluck a single branch from the flower and hold on to it. Superstision i guess...unless?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Do you take a branch?

choices.text: Sure, mom knows what shes talking about.
No, its a waste to ruin such a pretty flower.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You leave the flower alone.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The part of the flower that you have torn the branch from seems to already be recovering.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Neat. The flower isnt dead because of me.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You tear off a branch as carefully as possible.

menu_entry.text:
I took the branch of off the flower mom told me about. I was feeling some tough times coming in the future. 
If theres any truth to what moms saying it should..lets just say that I dont take chances.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Do you want to hide the key in the same spot as before?

choices.text: Yes. Dont need to be caught with them.
No. A bit longer I still have stuff to do.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You make sure to recreate the exact position and rotation that it was originaly in.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Looks about right.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You better make sure not to get caught with it.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You look under the cutting board that suspiciously is always in this exact spot.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You find a key. It looks similar to the one youve seen your dad lock the door to their room with.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hmmm..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The gods favour me today. Better hide that key in the deepest pocket i have.

menu_entry.text: I found where parents hide their key. Shit why am I writing it down fuck me....Anyway dad if youre reading this, your hiding spot was shit. It was just a matter of time.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Parents arent at home. Maybe i could have a look inside?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You decide to walk away.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Parents always tell me not to go there...what are they hiding?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You enter the one room your parents always tell you not to enter.

menu_entry.text: My hands are shaking. What could be in this room that makes them hide the key and lock the door whenever theyre not home?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The doors to your parents bedroom. Mom and dad are at home so better not even look at it.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The door to parents room is locked

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What are they hiding? They never allow me in.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Do you want to leave the room?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You exit the room.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You decide to stay

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I still have things to do but i need to be careful.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You found some money hidden away!

menu_entry.text: Hope dad wont be missing those 5 dollars. Or mom. Btw mom I cleaned my room for these. I deserve them by all the rights of this house.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You found some money hidden away!

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You have already taken the money

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The towns cinema

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Maybe I should see what their screening this week.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The thing..goodfellas..matrix

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I should Invite somebody, not going alone.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You see David already waiting at the cinema as you aproach

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey! Half expected you to not show up with the enthusiasm you showed when I asked you.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im not the kind of person to make you come here and then not show up.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: And I apreciate you for that dude.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Looks like the cinema is 5$ per person..

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You pay the full price for you and David

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: When was the last time youve been to the cinema?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Never.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Really? Then Im glad your first experience is this movie. Its a banger.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Ive never heard of it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It came out recently. Its a banger man. Youre gonna shit yourself.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: David indeed shit himself from the tense horor of the classic horror movie 'The thing'

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: So? How was it?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im probably not gonna sleep a couple nights. But it was the best freakin movie Ive ever seen dude!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I told you maaan.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Its the best.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: After a prolonged conversation about the details of the movie and wondering if childs was the thing you split up

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Thanks man..I really needed this.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dont mention it.

menu_entry.text: Been to the cinema with David. Hes actually a pretty funny guy and he enojyed the movie. He really needed a break like this I think.
|When you dissapoint people their opinion of you decreases. Same happens when you charm them or do a favour for them.|

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You pay the price only for yourself

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Youre gonna hate me for this..I didnt bring enough money for the both of us.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yeah I brought my own. Dont sweat it. You dont owe me anything.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: When was the last time youve been to the cinema?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Never.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Really? Then Im glad your first experience is this movie. Its a banger.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Ive never heard of it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It came out recently. Its a banger man. Youre gonna shit yourself.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: David indeed shit himself from the tense horor of the classic horror movie 'The thing'

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: So? How was it?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im probably not gonna sleep a couple nights. But it was the best freakin movie Ive ever seen dude!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I told you maaan.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Its the best.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: After a prolonged conversation about the details of the movie and wondering if childs was the thing, you split up

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Thanks man..I really got my money worth.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Glad you enjoyed it.

menu_entry.text: Been to the cinema with David. Hes actually a pretty funny guy and he enojyed the movie. He really needed a break like this I think.
|When you dissapoint people their opinion of you decreases. Same happens when you charm them or do a favour for them.|

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Devs note: You cant/dont want to play that money brokie?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Shit man..I-.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I forgot my wallet in my other pants..

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Oh yeah? What random turn of events. Me too!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: So uhh. Some other time?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: When youre not broke.

menu_entry.text: |When you dissapoint people their opinion of you decreases. Same happens when you charm them or do a favour for them.|
